description.en: Dynamic submucosal injection delivering a lifting cushion of appropriate solution to facilitate snare capture, with safe avoidance of injection through lesions suspected of containing submucosal invasive cancer.

criteria.en: Achieves a partial lift; needle position frequently incorrect.
Achieves consistent dynamic lift; tangential approach; recognises non-lifting sign; avoids injection through suspected SMI.
Teaches the technique; manages the non-lifting lesion; chooses injection solution by clinical context.
